function_v0.doc: (Only Owner) Sweep token balances from the contract to `to`.
function_v0.name: claim

function_v0.doc:
(Only Owner) Deposit USDC from owner into the contract's supply
position in `source_pool`. This is how the owner capitalizes or tops up
the contract without needing programmatic access to C-account positions
through a wallet UI.
function_v0.name: deposit

function_v0.doc: (Only Owner) Upgrade the contract to new WASM. The contract ID and all\nstored state (owner, position, submitters) are preserved.
function_v0.name: upgrade

function_v0.doc:
(Only Owner) Withdraw USDC from the contract's `source_pool` position to
any address (typically the owner's own wallet). Transfers the amount the
pool actually released \xe2\x80\x94 Blend caps a withdraw at the available position
and rounds in bToken terms, so transferring the realized delta (rather
than the requested `amount`) avoids the off-by-rounding revert.
function_v0.name: withdraw

function_v0.doc:
(Only Owner) Drain the entire USDC position in `source_pool` to `to` in
one transaction. Passes i128::MAX to the pool (Blend caps it at the live
position) and sweeps the full resulting USDC balance, so no caller-side
balance query or rounding buffer is needed.
function_v0.name: withdraw_all

function_v0.doc:
Initialize the contract.

### Arguments
* `owner` - Controls `claim`, `withdraw`, `set_owner`, `set_source_pool`,
`set_submitters`, `upgrade`.
* `backstop` - Blend backstop contract address.
* `usdc` - USDC token contract address.
* `source_pool` - The Blend pool where this contract holds a USDC supply
position. Withdrawals happen from here to fund fills.
* `submitters` - Allowlist of accounts permitted to call `fill_interest`.
The owner can update this later via `set_submitters`.
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc:
Fill an interest auction. The `submitter` must be on the allowlist and
must authorize the call (it is the fee-bumped source account in the
multi-submitter race). USDC is withdrawn from the contract's supply
position in `source_pool`, converted to backstop LP tokens via Comet,
and used to fill the auction in `pool`. Any unused USDC is re-supplied
back to `source_pool` so it keeps earning interest.

### Arguments
* `submitter` - The racing account invoking this fill (must be allowlisted).
* `pool` - Pool whose backstop has the interest auction.
* `fill_percent` - Percentage to fill (1-100).
* `max_usdc_in` - Upper bound of USDC to spend on this fill.
function_v0.name: fill_interest

function_v0.doc: (Only Owner) Replace the `fill_interest` allowlist. Pass the full set of\nauthorized submitter accounts (this overwrites, it does not append).
function_v0.name: set_submitters

function_v0.doc: (Only Owner) Change the pool this contract withdraws USDC from.
function_v0.name: set_source_pool
